'''Ekma''' was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Shamed Ones|Shamed One]] who lived in the ruins of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] beneath [[Coruscant/Legends#Yuuzhan'tar|Yuuzhan'tar]], along with [[Vuurok I'pan]]. He venerated the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] after the death of [[Ganner Rhysode]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
